message:
fix: skip CREATE DATABASE for read-only commands in dolt store

Wrap UOW1 (CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS) in a `if !cfg.ReadOnly` guard,
matching UOW2. This eliminates exclusive noms LOCK acquisition for
read-only commands (list, show, ready, etc.).

Fixes: bd-1de2r

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/obsidian
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
